ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the data entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code representing the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the data point */,
  "consumption_per_capita" REAL /* Per capita energy consumption measured in the specified unit */,
  "rural_type" TEXT /* Indicates whether the area is rural or urban */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Primary source of energy (e.g., solar, wind, hydro, fossil fuels) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., field studies, satellite imagery) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "code" TEXT /* Unique country code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the energy source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data collection method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_levels" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the access level applies to */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access to the table */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access to the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
